sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110665" key="fqegkto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθεγκ-τός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n110665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of being sounded,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1017f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
